key_finding: SNR = |R_TEP| / sigma_R is exactly alpha-independent for all loops. R_TEP and sigma_R both scale linearly with alpha, so their ratio is a pure geometric constant determined by the delay ratios and magnification contrasts alone. Inner-cross loops (S1-S2-S3, S1-S2-S4) have intrinsic SNR < 3 at any alpha. SX loops have intrinsic SNR = 60-78 at any alpha > 0. The detection question is purely geometric.
